topPrompts.prompt: Eye-level straight-on shot of a black glass vitamin C serum dropper bottle with black rubber bulb and white minimal label, pure white background, soft diffused light at 10 o'clock casting a clean soft shadow to the right, bottle centered and label-forward, 85mm f/5.6

Hip-level 45-degree shot of a black glass dropper bottle with white label on a white marble slab, one halved blood orange and a small sprig of eucalyptus beside it, soft window light at 2 o'clock creating gentle highlights on the glass and marble veins, 50mm f/2.8

Eye-level straight-on shot of a black glass vitamin C serum dropper bottle standing beside its white product box on a clean white surface, box slightly angled behind the bottle, soft diffused light at 11 o'clock casting matched soft shadows, both label and box typography facing forward, 70mm f/4

Hip-level 45-degree shot of a black glass dropper bottle on a dewy glass surface, two halved oranges and a small scattering of rough crystalline granules beside it, fine water droplets on the glass, soft backlight at 12 o'clock illuminating the droplets and casting a warm glow through the orange flesh, 35mm f/4

Eye-level straight-on shot of a black glass vitamin C serum dropper bottle with black rubber bulb and white minimal label reading VELA, pure white background, soft diffused light at 10 o'clock casting a clean soft shadow to the right, bottle centered and label-forward, 85mm f/5.6

Hip-level 45-degree shot of a black glass dropper bottle with white label reading VELA on a white marble slab, one halved blood orange and a small sprig of eucalyptus beside it, soft window light at 2 o'clock creating gentle highlights on the glass and marble veins, 50mm f/2.8

Eye-level straight-on shot of a black glass vitamin C serum dropper bottle standing beside its white product box reading VELA on a clean white surface, box slightly angled behind the bottle, soft diffused light at 11 o'clock casting matched soft shadows, both label and box facing forward, 70mm f/4

Hip-level 45-degree shot of a black glass dropper bottle with white label reading VELA on a dewy glass surface, two halved oranges and a small scattering of rough crystalline granules beside it, fine water droplets on the glass, soft backlight at 12 o'clock illuminating the droplets and casting a warm glow through the orange flesh, 35mm f/4

Eye-level straight-on shot of a black glass vitamin C serum dropper bottle with white label reading VELA, standing centered on a raw white stone pedestal, textured white plaster wall behind with geometric window light shadows falling across the wall, natural window light from 2 o'clock, 85mm f/4

Eye-level straight-on shot of a black glass dropper bottle with white label reading VELA beside its white product box reading VELA on a raw white stone pedestal, textured plaster wall behind with soft window shadow stripes, natural light from 11 o'clock, both label and box facing forward, 70mm f/4

Low angle 30-degree shot looking up at a black glass dropper bottle with white label reading VELA standing on a polished white marble surface, golden serum dripping from the black rubber dropper held just above the bottle, a single halved orange behind it out of focus, soft backlight from 12 o'clock rim-lighting the bottle and catching the serum drop mid-fall, 85mm f/2.8

Hip-level 45-degree shot of a black glass dropper bottle with white label reading VELA on a dewy glass surface with fine water droplets scattered around the base, two halved oranges and rough vitamin C crystals beside it, soft natural window light from 2 o'clock illuminating the water droplets into bright specular points, warm glow through the orange flesh, 35mm f/4
